prompt_text: Use this sprite sheet as reference and regenerate a clean animation sheet for state 'idle' with consistent character scale across all frames. Keep the same character identity and action. Output as a single sprite sheet image with evenly spaced frames, centered character per frame, no merged frames, no missing frames, no text, no watermark. Background must be pure chroma key green #00FF00 flat solid, no gradients, no shadows on background, no green spill on character.
